name: BT Brands, Inc.
business: BT Brands owns and operates quick-service and casual dining restaurants, including Burger Time, Keegan's Seafood Grille, Pie In The Sky Coffee and Bakery, and Schnitzel Haus. It also holds a minority interest in Bagger Dave's Burger Tavern. The company sells burgers, seafood, coffee, and German-themed cuisine to consumers.
sellsTo: Consumers in the Midwest, Florida, and Massachusetts

exposures.sentence: On September 2, 2025, we entered into an agreement to pursue a proposed business combination with Aero Velocity Inc., a private company that designs and manufactures American-made unmanned aerial vehicles and operates a Drones-as-a-Service business.
